reasoning: The primary limiter, shown by the 25W drop from 5-min to 20-min efforts, indicates poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. Given your week-long rest, we'll start controlled but address this by incorporating over-under intervals. By targeting wattages related to the main climb on Alpine Loop, you'll build resilience for prolonged efforts.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 12-minute over-unders: 3 mins at 242-256W, followed by 3 mins at 201-218W. Repeat twice more with 3-minute recovery in between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
